$comment: Tier-2 DB-state fixture spec for the physicalDescription-via-update seam of
v4's CharactersRepository.update (Phase-2, the store-backed capstone). Proves
the ALREADY-PORTED physical-md/physical-json descriptor branch of
applyDocumentStoreWriteOverlay: a non-null physicalDescription update writes
physical-description.md (fullDescription) + physical-prompts.json
(renderPhysicalPromptsJson, the five-key head/short/medium/long/complete
variant), and strips the key from the DB-bound patch (physicalDescription is
not a slim column, so the slim _update is skipped -> updatedAt NOT bumped).
FIXTURE: built by running v4's REAL repos.characters.create(character) with NO
physicalDescription, so the vault has only the scaffold's default four-key
physical-prompts.json and a blank physical-description.md. The single update op
then sets a non-null physicalDescription, overwriting both files. Both sides
operate on a COPY of this SAME baked fixture; the character id is read back.
OP: { physicalDescription } — writes physical-description.md +
physical-prompts.json; no slim-column keys, so the slim row is untouched.
REINDEX: the oracle drives the REAL update (no QUILLTAP_JOB_CHILD), so
reindexSingleFile runs; the differential pins the link chunkCount and excludes
doc_mount_chunks (as for create/update).
NORMALIZATION: minted-values remap with ONE shared id-map across all six
tables; timestamps -> <ts>; chunkCount -> <cc>. The two physical files' content
diffs EXACTLY.
SAFETY: testPepperBase64 is a THROWAWAY 32-byte key (the same one the other
characters fixtures use). NOT the real Friday pepper; safe to commit.

character.name: Evangeline
character.identity: A wandering scholar of forgotten tongues.
character.title: the scholar

physicalDescription.fullDescription: Tall, with ink-stained fingers and grey eyes.
physicalDescription.headAndShouldersPrompt: a woman with grey eyes, ink on her cheek
physicalDescription.mediumPrompt: a tall scholar with ink-stained fingers
physicalDescription.longPrompt: a tall woman, grey eyes, ink-stained fingers, worn coat
physicalDescription.completePrompt: a tall woman with grey eyes, ink-stained fingers, and a worn travelling coat
